title: Avoid variable self-assignment
description: Self-assigning a variable to itself serves no purpose and is either redundant code or indicates a logic error. Such statements suggest a copy-paste mistake or misunderstanding of the intended operation.
recommendation: Remove redundant self-assignments or correct the logic to assign the intended value.

noncompliant.description: Self-assigning variables serves no purpose and often indicates copy-paste errors or misunderstood logic.

compliant.description: Removing self-assignments and implementing proper logic ensures code behaves as intended and eliminates redundant operations.
